<div align="center">

## 🌌 Overview

</div>

> **RaspberryRhythm** is a powerful Telegram music bot designed for smooth and high-quality **audio & video streaming** in voice chats.  
> Built with performance, simplicity, and stability in mind.

✨ Clean architecture  
⚡ Fast response  
🎧 Smooth playback  
🔒 Reliable system  

---

<div align="center">

## ✨ Features

</div>

<div align="center">

| 🎧 Streaming | ⚡ Speed | 🔒 Stability |
|------------|--------|-------------|
| Audio & Video | Ultra Fast | Reliable System |

| 🧠 Smart System | 🚫 Clean Setup | 🎯 Easy Use |
|---------------|--------------|------------|
| Auto Handling | No complexity | Beginner Friendly |

</div>

<div align="center">

## 🚀 Deployment

</div>

### ☁️ Deploy on Heroku

<div align="center">

[![Deploy](https://img.shields.io/badge/🚀%20Deploy%20on%20Heroku-430098?style=for-the-badge&logo=heroku&logoColor=white)](https://dashboard.heroku.com/new?template=https://github.com/DivineDemonn/RaspberryRhythm)

</div>

---

### 🖥️ &nbsp; Local / VPS Deployment

<div align="center">

[![📋 sample.env](https://img.shields.io/badge/📋%20Required%20Variables-sample.env-0ea5e9?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/DivineDemonn/RaspberryRhythm/blob/main/sample.env)&nbsp;
[![📚 Full Docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/📚%20Full%20VPS%20Guide-Read%20Docs-7c3aed?style=for-the-badge)](https://stranger-organization.gitbook.io/stranger-music-docs/local-vps-deploy)

</div>

<br/>

**Step 1 — Clone & Prepare System**

```bash
# 📥 Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/xbitcode/music && cd music

# 🔄 Update system packages
sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get upgrade -y

# 🎬 Install ffmpeg
sudo apt-get install ffmpeg -y
```

**Step 2 — Install Dependencies**

```bash
# ⚡ Install uv (Python package manager)
curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
source $HOME/.local/bin/env

# 📦 Create virtual environment and install dependencies
uv venv && uv sync
```

**Step 3 — Configure Environment**

```bash
# ⚙️ Set up your environment variables
cp sample.env .env
vi .env
```

> 💡 Press `I` to enter insert mode → fill in your variables → press `Esc` → type `:wq` to save & exit.

**Step 4 — Launch the Bot**

```bash
# 🖥️ Install tmux (keeps bot alive after terminal closes)
sudo apt install tmux && tmux

# ▶️ Start the bot
bash start
```

> 💡 Detach from tmux without killing it: Press `Ctrl+b` then `d`

<br/>
